mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.gym_id, r.client_id, u.name AS client_name, r.rating, r.comment, r.created_at FROM REVIEW_GYM r JOIN `USER` u ON r.client_id = u.id WHERE r.gym_id = #{value} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 4
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW_GYM ( gym_id, client_id, rating, comment, created_at ) VALUES ( #{gymId}, #{clientId}, #{rating}, #{comment}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.gym_id, r.client_id, u.name AS client_name, r.rating, r.comment, r.created_at, r.file FROM REVIEW_GYM r JOIN `USER` u ON r.client_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{value}

SELECT r.id, r.gym_id, r.client_id, u.name AS client_name, r.rating, r.comment, r.created_at, r.file FROM REVIEW_GYM r JOIN `USER` u ON r.client_id = u.id WHERE r.gym_id = #{value} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
